---
title: Diego Chuquimia's CV
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---
# Diego Chuquimia

Analytical Economics Student, Data Science Minor, BYU-Idaho.

::: {#webaddress}
<a href="mailto:chuquimiadiego@gmail.com">chuquimiadiego\@gmail.com</a> \|
(571) 7767092 \|
<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/diegoach">linkedin.com/in/diegoach</a> \|
<a href="https://linktr.ee/chdiego">linktr.ee/chdiego</a>
:::

## Currently

Economics student at Brigham Young University - Idaho, graduating
December 2026, with a minor in Data Science.

### Specialized in

Financial analysis, operational reporting, and business intelligence
tools including Power BI, Excel, SQL, and R.

### Research interests

Treasury operations, financial systems, forecasting, dashboard
development, and enterprise analytics.

## Education

`September 2022 - December 2026`
**Brigham Young University - Idaho**

- Bachelor of Science in Economics / Data Science minor
- Marketing Director at Economics Society
- Relevant coursework: Business Analytics, Labor Economics, Law &
  Economics, Behavioral Economics, and Data Science Programming

## Core Competencies

### Certifications

Data Science, Excel and Power BI – Data Analysis and Visualization,
SQL for Finance, Alteryx for Financial Services.

### Tools & Technologies

- **Excel & Data Visualization:** PivotTables, XLOOKUP/VLOOKUP,
  SUMIFS, reporting automation dashboards, data visualization, charts
- **Business Intelligence:** SQL, Advanced Excel, Power BI, Tableau
- **Programming:** Python, RStudio

### Languages

Spanish, fluent; Portuguese, intermediate.

## Experience

`July 2024 - September 2025`
**Degree Verification Specialist**, *Brigham Young University - Idaho*,
Rexburg, Idaho

- Created and reviewed degree evaluation reports, maintaining 100%
  accuracy in awarding processes and ensuring data integrity across
  student records.
- Utilized Excel and CX platforms to examine and validate 100+ student
  data across academic programs, generating tracking reports to improve
  degree completion and support data-driven decisions.

`March 2025 - September 2025`
**Peer Academic Mentor**, *Brigham Young University - Idaho*,
Rexburg, Idaho

- Conducted and compiled detailed research on 25+ academic programs and
  industry certifications, supporting students in making informed
  decisions aligned with career market trends and salary benchmarks.
- Trained peers using 20+ student cases and cooperated cross-functionally
  to improve accuracy and consistency in degree audit reviews.

`August 2019 - December 2019`
**Logistics Assistant**, *Bountiful Corp, Auditing Firm*,
Santa Cruz, Bolivia

- Performed financial reconciliations and validated transaction records
  using Excel to support reporting accuracy and financial controls.
- Verified 100+ financial transactions, receipts, and purchase records
  against reports and balance sheets, identifying and resolving
  discrepancies.
- Assisted with operational reporting and financial documentation
  processes in a fast-paced auditing environment.

## Projects

`December 2025`
**Housing Market Price Trend Analysis**

*R, Advanced Excel, Statistical Modeling, Regression Analysis, ANOVA*

- Analyzed 108 multi-year housing pricing data points using R and Excel
  to identify financial trends and cost patterns across property
  management companies.
- Executed statistical analysis, including mean price comparisons, ANOVA
  testing, and linear regression modeling, to evaluate pricing changes
  over time.
- Identified pricing outliers and interpreted market trends using
  quantitative analysis and financial data visualization techniques.

`May 2026`
**Performance Recognition – Power BI Dashboard**

*Power BI, Microsoft Forms, Data Integration, Dashboard Development*

- Automated reporting workflows and data integration processes to improve
  reporting efficiency and real-time dashboard accuracy.
- Developed scalable dashboard and reporting solutions to improve
  visibility into employee engagement and organizational recognition
  metrics.

```{=html}
<!-- ### Footer
Last updated: June 2026 -->
```
